title: Parents Think They Understand How Kids Use AI
description: Recent surveys reveal a major disconnect between how parents think their children use artificial intelligence and what teenagers are actually doing with it—from homework to emotional support. title: In Marathon, A.I. Is Everywhere and Humanity Is an Anomaly
description: Over the decades, the depiction of artificial intelligence has evolved from sci-fi villain to systemic reality.

title: Meta’s new display glasses withheld from EU over battery rules, supply shortages

title: Trump’s unified approach is the right AI regulatory path
description: The United States is in an artificial intelligence arms race with China and cannot afford 50 different regulatory AI regimes.
content:
AI could upend modern life, changing everything from medicine to the foundations of the economy. It is at the center of the emerging geopolitical competition between the U.S. and China. The stakes could hardly be higher.

title: Anthropic boss Dario Amodei to meet Chalmers, Albanese in Canberra
description: The meetings are unlikely to resolve the impasse over key issues such as copyright reform which are standing in the way of the artificial intelligence giant building data centres here.

title: True Story Films and Collective Studios Announce ‘Khana Dil Se’, India’s First AI-Powered Food Show
description: Collective Studios has partnered with True Story Films to launch Khana Dil Se – An AI Journey Through Indias Kitchen, an episodic series that explores Indias culinary heritage using artificial intelligence. Created by Hansal Mehta, the show marks his return to food storytelling decades after Khana Khazana. It features chef Shamsher Ahmed as culinary consultant, bringing expertise in regional cuisines.

title: US music publishers suing Anthropic make their case against AI 'fair use'
